title: Facilities Construction: Construction Manager-Agent
description: When Conroe ISD takes on building or renovation projects, it sometimes hires a construction manager-agent — a professional who oversees the work on the district's behalf. This policy sets the rules for how that manager is selected, what their responsibilities are, and how the process stays fair and transparent. Residents and taxpayers can trust that proper oversight is in place to help ensure school construction projects are completed responsibly and within budget.
